name: Order Express - Los Angeles Olympic Check Cashing
description_short: Order Express is a money services company offering check cashing, money transfers, money orders, and bill payment at 70+ branches across 25 states, with the Los Angeles Olympic location open weekdays 8am-4pm and Saturday 8am-2pm.
description_long:
Order Express Inc. was founded in 1993 as a Mexican-owned company operating under US law and regulations. The company began with a single branch in Chicago, Illinois, targeting the Latino immigrant community, and has grown into a regulated financial services network operating in 25 states. As of January 2021, Order Express operates more than 70 company-owned branches and authorized agent locations across the country. The Los Angeles Olympic branch is located at 1251 E Olympic Blvd Unit 105 in downtown Los Angeles, serving the local community with extended hours on Friday (7:30am-6pm).

Order Express provides a range of consumer financial services beyond basic check cashing. Primary offerings include check cashing, money transfer services, money orders, bill payment, currency exchange, phone top-ups, bus passes, and Bitcoin ATM access. The company also provides supplementary services including plane ticket sales, courier services, and vehicle-related services. All services are available in both English and Spanish, reflecting the company's heritage and customer base.

The Los Angeles Olympic location differentiates itself through strong customer service ratings (4.8 stars on Google) and staff attention to detail—including one review noting the staff paid a customer's parking lot fee. The branch maintains extended Friday hours (7:30am-6pm) to accommodate working customers and operates a loyalty program. The company's bilingual operations and multi-service model mean customers can handle multiple financial needs at a single location.

As a check-cashing and money services business, Order Express does not originate loans, provide credit products, or offer traditional banking services. Customers should verify current fees and exchange rates directly, as these are not disclosed on the website. The company's strength lies in serving unbanked and underbanked populations needing quick cash access and money transfer capabilities rather than credit solutions.
address: 1251 E Olympic Blvd Unit 105, Los Angeles, CA 90021

company_info.headquarters: 1251 E Olympic Blvd Unit 105, Los Angeles, CA 90021

pros: Extended Friday hours until 6pm accommodating working customers
4.8-star Google rating with specific praise for staff professionalism and customer care
Bilingual English/Spanish service reflecting customer demographic
Multi-service location: check cashing, money transfer, bill payment, currency exchange, and Bitcoin ATM all in one branch
Staff noted for going above service expectations (e.g., paying customer parking)
Loyalty program available for repeat customers
Established 30-year company (founded 1993) with 70+ regulated branches in 25 states
Convenient downtown LA location near public transit
cons: No fees or rates disclosed on website—customers must visit or call for pricing
Limited weekday hours (8am-4pm Monday-Friday except Friday) may not suit all work schedules
No online check cashing or remote money transfer options visible
Does not offer credit products, loans, or credit-building services for customers needing to establish credit
Saturday hours limited to 8am-2pm, closed Sundays
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked immigrants needing bilingual money transfer and check cashing services
Spanish-speaking customers seeking familiar, community-oriented financial services
People working standard hours needing Friday evening check cashing (open until 6pm)
Customers needing multiple services (check cashing + bill payment + currency exchange) at one location
diagnosis: Order Express Los Angeles Olympic is best suited for Spanish-speaking or bilingual customers and immigrants needing quick check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services without a traditional bank account. The main caveat is that this is a cash-access and money services business, not a credit lender—customers seeking personal loans, credit building, or debt solutions should look elsewhere.
